steps.instruction:
*🔐 Step 1: Get IT Approval First (MANDATORY)*
• You MUST get permission from the IT team before installing ANY software on a company machine.
• Raise a request to the IT Helpdesk specifying you need Citrix Workspace.
• Do NOT proceed with installation until IT confirms approval.
_Expected: You receive IT approval confirmation._

*📥 Step 2: Download Citrix Workspace*
• Once approved, download the latest version from the official Citrix site:
`https://www.citrix.com/downloads/workspace-app/windows/workspace-app-for-windows-latest.html`
• Save the `.exe` file to your Downloads folder.
_Expected: `CitrixWorkspaceApp.exe` is downloaded. (Note: Ensure your Windows 10/11 system has at least 4GB RAM)._

*🖱️ Step 3: Run the Installer (Windows)*
• Right-click the downloaded `CitrixWorkspaceApp.exe` file.
• Select **Run as Administrator**.
• When the installer window opens, click **Start**.
_Expected: The Citrix installation wizard begins._

*⚙️ Step 4: Accept License & Install*
• Check **✔ I accept the license agreement** and click **Next**.
• In the optional settings screen (Single sign-on, app protection, etc.), normally just click **Next** unless told otherwise by IT.
• Click **Install**.
_Expected: Installation completes in 1-3 minutes. Click **Finish**._

*🔑 Step 5: Add Your Citrix Account*
• Open Citrix Workspace.
• Enter your company server URL (e.g., `https://companyname.cloud.com`) or email.
• Login using your Username, Password, and Domain (if required).
_Expected: Apps, Desktops, and Virtual Machines screen appears. Click any app to launch!_
